"'''''Black Ice'''''" is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] adventure book for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The adventure scenario sends [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agents on a mission to capture the massive [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Field Secured Container Vessel/Legends|cargo ship]] ''[[Black Ice/Legends|Black Ice]]'' before the Empire can use the resources it carries to devastate the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]].

The ''Black Ice'' set includes maps and detailed deck plans of the ''Black Ice'', as well as a [[Star Warriors: Starfighter Combat in the Star Wars Universe|''Star Warriors'']] mini-campaign with full-color counters. ''Black Ice'' was written by [[Paul Murphy]] and [[Bill Slavicsek]], and published by [[West End Games]] in [[1990]].

==Publisher's summary==
===Front cover===
''Rebel heroes lead the attack against an Imperial Fleet!''

''The prize: The Empire's biggest cargo vessel - the ''Black Ice''!''

===Back cover===
'''Black Ice. ''7,800 meters long - ''five times'' the length of an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer. The pride of the Imperial Replenishment Fleet.'''

'''Black Ice.''' ''It carries nearly ''one billion'' tons of starship-grade fuel cells - more than a year's worth for an entire Imperial Main Battle Fleet.''

'''Black Ice.''' ''If she remains in the Empire's hands, the Imperial Navy will cut a swath of destruction across the sector - and beyond.''

'''Black Ice.''' ''The Empire will do everything in its power to protect her.

'''Black Ice.''' ''The Rebels must take her - or die in the attempt.''
